overview: Death Beetle is a Normal-class Beast/Insect monster found in Goblin Cave, Inferno. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 0 HP, 10 physical damage, 200 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 6, MaxImpactEndurance 2. 2 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Attack at 180% ratio (180 base damage). Sight range 1000, combat radius 140. Nightmare gains 1 exclusive abilityy: Attack Twice.

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

status_effects_detail.name: Paralyze
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Paralyze icon on your status bar.

strategies.title: Elemental Weaknesses: Ice, Light
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Ice (-3000), Light (-3000). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Nightmare Gains: Attack Twice
strategies.description: Nightmare grade has 1 exclusive abilities not present in lower grades: Attack Twice. These change the fight dynamics in Nightmare.

strategies.title: Detection Range: 1000 units
strategies.description: Sight radius 1000 units, loses target at 1300 units, 180° vision angle.

strategies.title: Combat Range: combat area radius 140, ability check distance 200
strategies.description: Combat area radius 140. Ability check distance 200.

elite_differences: ActionSpeed 0 → 100 in Elite — attacks animate faster
ActionSpeed 0 → 200 in Nightmare — attacks animate faster
Nightmare gains 1 exclusive abilities: Attack Twice

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
ai_perception.sight_description: Detects targets within 1000 units. Loses target at 1300 units.
